spec_match.rationale: Correctly checks the presence of hasStorageAccess, requestStorageAccess, and the deprecated requestStorageAccessFor.

interactive.rationale: Provides 3 action buttons that execute the real API methods in the current browser, outputting detailed JSON status descriptions or runtime errors in color-coded boxes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligned with the parent description: checks hasStorageAccess, requestStorageAccess, and requestStorageAccessFor concurrently.

edge_cases.rationale: Implements try-catch and method-existence guards to ensure the script executes gracefully even in browsers where requestStorageAccessFor is completely stripped.

references.rationale: The page now includes a see-also section with the required ChromeStatus entry and PrivacyCG Storage Access references.

design_system.rationale: Conforms beautifully to design styling: uses standard spacing, clear comparison grids, crumb lists, and standard tables.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: A compliant, interactive diagnostic page that runs real-time diagnostics on all Storage Access API surfaces and now includes the required ChromeStatus and PrivacyCG reference links.
